data.description:
3 SENIOR AMERICANS TOLD ME THAT NEGOTIATIONS ARE UNDERWAY BETWEEN THE US AND IRAN ON A CEASEFIRE IN EXCHANGE FOR OPENING THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ. ACCORDING TO THEM, IT'S STILL UNCLEAR WHETHER A DEAL CAN BE REACHED.
- AXIOS REPORTER
3 US Officials: Unclear if deal can be reached - Axios
Discussions are taking place about a possible ceasefire between the US and Iran in return for the reopening of the Hormuz Strait - Axios reporter on X.

Intel buying back the stake in its Ireland fab is genuinely surprising. It is remarkable that the company’s financial position improved so much in such a short period of time. It can also be interpreted as a sign that the company is very optimistic about its CPU business going forward.

data.title: Ripple's (XRP) Treasury now supports XRP and RLUSD, offering CFOs a unified platform for crypto and fiat management.
data.description: Ripple has introduced Digital Asset Accounts and Unified Treasury features, enabling Chief Financial Officers (CFOs) to oversee both cryptocurrency and traditional fiat currencies on a single platform. This marks the first time that financial decision-makers can manage these assets together. This move aims to streamline operations and provide greater flexibility in managing finances. This development signifies a significant step in bridging the gap between digital currencies and traditional financial systems, offering new possibilities for CFOs.
Al Jazeera, citing Israeli Channel 14: The current Iranian attack on Israel is the largest since the beginning of the war.

data.title: Ripple integrates digital asset support into treasury platform, offering real-time tools for corporate finance.
data.description: The latest update includes new features such as the addition of digital asset accounts and real-time visibility tools for corporate finance teams. This update is designed to help teams manage liquidity more effectively across different systems.

data.title: Franklin Templeton expands crypto involvement by acquiring CoinFund spinoff 250 Digital to launch Franklin Crypto for institutional crypto investment.
data.description: In a recent development, Franklin Templeton has finalized a deal to purchase 250 Digital, a spinoff of CoinFund, with the aim of launching Franklin Crypto. This new entity will focus on providing specialized crypto investment management services for institutional clients.
Top Gulf aluminum producer EGA halted smelter after Iran strike.

data.title: DoubleLine Yield Opportunities Fund Declares April 2026 Distribution
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, on April 1, 2026, the DoubleLine Yield Opportunities Fund (traded as DLY on NYSE) announced a monthly distribution of $0.1167 per share for April 2026. The declaration is subject to specific conditions as outlined by the fund.

data.title: An InventHelp 123Invent Client Develops New Sifting Device for Ranchers (LBT-9767)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on April 1, 2026, an inventor from Longmont, Colorado, shared their motivation behind creating a new device aimed at aiding in the separation of bedding from horse manure during stall cleaning. The inventor introduced THE APPLE CART, a specialized tool intended to save time in the process. This innovation is set to revolutionize the way stall cleaning is approached.

data.title: SUBARU UNVEILS ALL-NEW, ALL-ELECTRIC, THREE-ROW 2027 SUBARU GETAWAY WITH 420 HORSEPOWER, MORE THAN 300 MILES OF RANGE, STANDARD ALL-WHEEL DRIVE
data.description: Every trim option comes with the renowned Subaru Symmetrical All-Wheel Drive system and 420 horsepower, ensuring confidence both on and off the road, with a remarkable 0-60 mph acceleration in under 5 seconds. The vehicle also boasts a towing capacity of up to 3,500 pounds. Additionally, it includes a standard NACS-compatible charging port capable of reaching charging speeds of around 150 kW, providing efficient recharging capabilities.

data.title: CDB Aviation Delivers First of Two Airbus A321neo Aircraft to Icelandair
data.description: In Reykjavík, Iceland, CDB Aviation, an Irish subsidiary of China Development Bank Financial Leasing Co., Limited, recently delivered the initial Airbus A321LR aircraft out of two to Icelandair (ICE: ICEAIR). The long-term lease agreements for both A321LR aircraft were inked between Icelandair and CDB Aviation in January 2024. The delivery of the first aircraft took place in March 2026, with the second unit anticipated to be received by the airline soon.

data.title: Atlantic Ultraviolet Corporation® Achieves A+ Accreditation with the Better Business Bureau®
data.description: A company based in Hauppauge, New York, known as Atlantic Ultraviolet Corporation, has recently earned accreditation from the Better Business Bureau. Specializing in germicidal UV equipment and lamps for over 60 years, since 1963, the company has met the BBB's criteria regarding ethical advertising, lawful business practices, and customer satisfaction. This recognition highlights the company's commitment to upholding high standards in its operations.

data.title: OneStream Announces Completion of Acquisition by Hg for $6.4 Billion
data.description: In Birmingham, Michigan on April 1, 2026, OneStream, a prominent enterprise Finance management platform, announced their innovative approach to redefining the Office of the CFO. By integrating essential Finance and operational tasks such as financial close, consolidation, reporting, planning, and forecasting, OneStream is revolutionizing the industry.
